creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
----- Forwarded message from Rusty Nejdl <rnejdl@ringofsaturn.com> -----

Date: Thu, 26 Apr 2012 22:25:13 -0500
From: Rusty Nejdl <rnejdl@ringofsaturn.com>
To: edwin@freebsd.org
Subject: Re: ports/167345: Update port audio/pianobar to 2012.04.24 and
	include a patch

It looks like this can be closed as someone else also submitted this.
I did search the PR's and did not find one with pianobar in it's one
line or multiline description so that's why I submitted this.  Other
PR is ports/167347.  This was submitted after mine. :(

Rusty

----- End forwarded message -----
